scripts.all:check: echo '=====[ Running the `ALL:CHECK` script... ]====='; yarn run lint && yarn run type:check
scripts.lint: echo '=====[ Running the `LINT` script... ]====='; echo 'yarn run esl && yarn run format && yarn run style'
scripts.lint:commit: echo 'NOTE :: Run `check-for-leaks && lint-staged` once I figure out their output issues' && exit 0
scripts.code:review: echo '=====[ Running the `CODE:REVIEW` script... ]====='; coderabbit review --plain --type committed
scripts.secrets:check: echo '=====[ Running the `SECRETS:CHECK` script... ]====='; ggshield secret scan path . --recursive --yes
scripts.test: echo '=====[ Running the `TEST` script... ]====='; echo 'vitest run --config vite.config.ts'
